description_long: This object is a modern potted plant featuring a tall, slender white ceramic pot supported by a minimalist metal stand with four legs. The plant itself is an elegant orchid with a single, arching green stem topped by several delicate white flowers with yellow centers. The pot is filled with a light-colored substrate, likely decorative stones or orchid bark, visible at the top. The leaves are broad, glossy, and green, radiating outward from the base of the stem. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, making it suitable for stylish urban interiors or exteriors. There are no visible decorative patterns on the pot, and the plant appears healthy and well-maintained.
description: A modern white orchid in a tall, plain ceramic pot with a minimalist metal stand, featuring broad green leaves and delicate white flowers. The design is sleek and suitable for contemporary urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arch of white orchid flowers, broad green leaves, and the clean lines of the white pot and metal stand.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the back of the orchid flowers and the alignment of the leaves, with the pot and stand visible from a narrower angle.
description_view_2: Opposite front view similar to view 0, showing the orchid flowers and leaves from the other side, with the pot and stand clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the plant, with the leaves and stem more prominent and the flowers partially obscured.
